CSMIN.name: Computer Science
CSMIN.description: A minor in Computer Science introduces key computing concepts including programming, algorithms, and systems.

CYMIN.name: Cybersecurity
CYMIN.description: A minor in Cybersecurity provides foundational knowledge of computer security, networks, and systems security.

DSMIN.name: Data Science
DSMIN.description: A minor in Data Science introduces statistical and computational methods for working with data.

AIMIN.name: Artificial Intelligence
AIMIN.description: A minor in Artificial Intelligence introduces core AI concepts including search, reasoning, and machine learning.
